_description: SJCL AES-CCM known-answer vectors derived from sjclCrypto.js behavior. The salt is hex-decoded to binary (sjcl.codec.hex.toBits) before PBKDF2, NOT UTF-8 encoded. These vectors anchor our Python implementation against the real SJCL protocol.

regression_guard._description: The WRONG key produced by salt.encode('utf-8') instead of bytes.fromhex(salt). Tests MUST verify the derived key does NOT equal this value.
